metadata.title: LegacyShield | Secure Digital Estate Planning & Document Vault
metadata.description: Securely store your most precious documents — passports, wills, insurance — with zero-knowledge encryption and emergency access for loved ones.

register.title: Create your account
register.referred: You've been invited by a friend! Create your account to get started with a free encrypted vault.

readiness.title: Legacy Readiness
readiness.subtitle: Essential documents for your loved ones

hero.title: If you died tomorrow, would your family be locked out?
hero.subtitle: Most loved ones spend 6 months fighting banks and cloud providers just to access basic documents. LegacyShield gives them a <strongItem>single unlock phrase</strongItem> to your most important papers — passports, wills, and insurance.
hero.disclaimer: Free forever · No credit card required

features.sectionSubtitle: Built from the ground up for people who take document security seriously.

encryption.title: Military-Grade Encryption
encryption.desc: Your files are encrypted in your browser before they ever leave your device. Not on our servers. Not in transit. On YOUR device. We never see the original — only you hold the key.

emergency.title: Emergency Access
emergency.desc: Designate trusted contacts who can access your vault using a secret unlock phrase. When it matters most, your loved ones won't be locked out.

hosting.title: EU-Only Hosting
hosting.desc: Your encrypted data lives on European-owned servers (Hetzner, Germany) — not AWS, not Google. No US CLOUD Act. No foreign government access. GDPR-native by design.

proof.title: We Can't See Your Files. Literally.
proof.subtitle: This isn't a marketing claim. It's the architecture.

visual.blindText: We can see that a file exists, but we have no way to decrypt it or see its content.

keys.title: You Hold the Keys
keys.desc: Your encryption key is derived from your password and never leaves your device. We don't store it, we don't see it, and we can't reset it.

infra.title: Sovereign Infrastructure
infra.desc: We don't use US-owned cloud providers like AWS or Google Cloud. Your data lives on European-owned hardware in Germany and Finland, protected by strict EU privacy laws.

noReset.title: No Password Reset
noReset.desc: If you lose your password, we can't recover your files. Not our support team, not our engineers. That's how seriously we take your privacy.

noHandover.title: Nothing to Hand Over
noHandover.desc: Even with a court order, we can only provide encrypted data. Without your key, it's useless.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to protect your most important documents.

step1.title: Upload Your Documents
step1.desc: Drag and drop your important files. They're encrypted instantly in your browser.

step2.title: Set Up Emergency Access
step2.desc: Add trusted contacts and create a secret unlock phrase only they would know.

step3.title: Rest Easy
step3.desc: Your documents are safe, encrypted, and accessible to the right people when it matters.

useCases.title: What to Store
useCases.subtitle: The documents you hope you'll never need — but will be glad you saved.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

cta.title: Protect What Matters Most
cta.subtitle: Your documents. Your family's peace of mind. Start securing them today.

footer.tagline: Built in Europe, hosted on European-owned infrastructure

whatIf.headline: What happens if you are not here tomorrow?
whatIf.line1: Your partner searches your email for insurance documents.
whatIf.line2: Your children call banks you never told them about.
whatIf.line3: Your will sits in a drawer no one knows exists.
whatIf.stat: Every year, families lose access to billions in assets — not because the money is not there, but because the information is not.
whatIf.resolution: LegacyShield makes sure that never happens to your family.

referral.title: You've been invited to LegacyShield
referral.subtitle: A friend wants to help you secure your most important documents for your family.
referral.prop2: Emergency access for your loved ones
referral.prop3: Encrypted on your device, not our servers
referral.learnMore: Learn more about how encryption works

hero.title: Made in Europe. Owned by Europeans.
hero.subtitle: Your most sensitive documents deserve infrastructure that answers to European law — not American boardrooms.

infrastructure.title: Our Infrastructure
infrastructure.subtitle: We don’t just run in an EU region of an American cloud. We use European-owned infrastructure, end to end.

aws.title: AWS EU Region
aws.subtitle: Still US-owned, still subject to US law
aws.point1: US parent company — subject to CLOUD Act
aws.point2: US government can compel data access
aws.point3: EU data stored on US-owned hardware

zeroKnowledge.title: Zero-Knowledge Goes Further
zeroKnowledge.subtitle: Even if someone breached our servers, they’d get nothing but encrypted noise.
zeroKnowledge.point1: We can’t read your files. Not won’t — can’t.
zeroKnowledge.point2: No American service ever touches your unencrypted data.
zeroKnowledge.point3: Your encryption key never leaves your browser.
zeroKnowledge.point4: Even a server breach yields only meaningless encrypted blobs.

honesty.title: What We Can’t Avoid
honesty.subtitle: We believe in transparency. Here’s where US services are involved — and why it doesn’t matter for your files.
honesty.point1: Email delivery (Resend) and payment processing (Stripe) are US-based services. They handle metadata like email addresses — never your encrypted files.
honesty.point2: Your documents are encrypted in your browser before they ever leave your device. These services never see your actual files.
honesty.point3: The separation is absolute: US services handle communication and payments. Your encrypted documents live exclusively on European infrastructure.

encryption.label: Encryption
encryption.value: AES-256-GCM — in your browser, before upload

atRest.label: Data at Rest
atRest.value: Encrypted blob — we can’t decrypt it

cta.title: Protect Your Documents with European Infrastructure
cta.subtitle: Zero-knowledge encryption. European-owned servers. No compromises.

metadata.title: Your Data Is Yours — LegacyShield Continuity & Security Promise
metadata.description: What happens if LegacyShield shuts down? Your data stays yours. Zero-knowledge encryption means we never hold your keys.

hero.title: Your Data Is Yours. Always.
hero.subtitle: What happens if we shut down? What if we get hacked? Here's the truth.

shutdown.title: What if we shut down?
shutdown.intro: This is the question every user should ask before trusting a service with their most important documents.

point1.title: 90-day notice minimum
point1.desc: If we ever decide to shut down LegacyShield, we will give you at least 90 days' notice to export your data.

point2.title: Export tool always available
point2.desc: Download everything in one click. Your files, your contacts, your settings — all of it.

point3.title: Your keys, your files
point3.desc: Encryption keys are derived from YOUR password — we never hold them. If our servers disappear, your files are encrypted blobs — but you can always re-derive the key.

point4.title: No lock-in
point4.desc: Your data is yours. We will never hold it hostage or make it difficult to leave.

point5.title: No VC pressure
point5.desc: We have no venture capital investors pushing us to pivot or monetize your data. We're building for the long term.

hacked.title: What if we get hacked?
hacked.intro: Every company is a potential target. Here's what happens if someone breaches our servers.

point1.title: Zero-knowledge = breach exposes only encrypted blobs
point1.desc: Attackers would find meaningless encrypted data. Without your password, they can't decrypt anything.

point2.title: No master key exists anywhere
point2.desc: There's no backdoor, no master key, no way for us (or anyone else) to decrypt your files without your password.

point3.title: AES-256-GCM — same standard governments use
point3.desc: Military-grade encryption. The same standard used by governments and intelligence agencies worldwide.

point4.title: Your password never leaves your device
point4.desc: We never see your password. It stays on your device and is used to derive your encryption key locally.

privacyLaws.title: Why your data stays safe — regardless of politics
privacyLaws.intro: We've thought about this. Here's our commitment to European privacy.

point1.title: European-owned infrastructure (Hetzner, Germany)
point1.desc: We don't use US cloud providers with an EU region. We use European-owned servers in Germany and Finland.

point2.title: US CLOUD Act does not apply to us
point2.desc: Because we don't use US-owned infrastructure, American law enforcement cannot compel us to hand over your data.

point3.title: We would move jurisdictions before compromising privacy
point3.desc: If the EU ever weakened privacy protections, we would relocate to a jurisdiction that values privacy before compromising your security.

point4.title: Warrant canary on our status page
point4.desc: We publish a monthly warrant canary. If we're ever compelled to hand over data (or stay silent about it), you'll know.

point1.title: Simplicity over feature bloat
point1.desc: We won't add features just to add features. LegacyShield does one thing exceptionally well: secure your most important documents.

point2.title: Open about our security design
point2.desc: We publish detailed explanations of our encryption, key derivation, and architecture. No security through obscurity.

point3.title: Built for the next generation, not the next quarter
point3.desc: This isn't a get-rich-quick scheme. We're building a service that will be here for decades, not years.

point4.title: Your trust is our only currency
point4.desc: If we lose your trust, we lose everything. That's why transparency and honesty are non-negotiable.

cta.title: Ready to Secure Your Legacy?
cta.subtitle: Start with a free account. No credit card required.
